calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-27-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and of a Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Jacqueline Chan.
Petitioner: Xiao Hong Yu, present in pro per for self and as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Yu Ting Chen, and with Cantonese Interpreter: Lihong Tan.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and direct examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
After hearing the testimony and considered the Declaration filed by Ms. Yu, it appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Amy Yee, and Change of Name of a Minor to: Steven Yee.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-16-2006 Text Ruling

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-16-2006 Reset To Jun-27-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Pappina Thompson.
Petitioner: Xiao Hong Yu, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Yu Ting Chen, and with Cantonese Interpreter: Lihong Tan.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent or proof of service on notice, the OSC for Change of Name of an Adult anf of a Minor is continued to June 27, 2006 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to submit proof of service to the Minor's father of the new hearing date or request for an Order Dispensing Notice.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-04-2006 Reset To May-16-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
